message:
feat(robot-api): add TxRollback surface to ApiSurface contract

Add TxRollback variant to ApiSurface enum for the tx-rollback endpoint
that executes compensation for committed transaction steps. Wire it into
ALL, slug(), is_mutation() (returns true), and family() (grouped under
"tx" alongside TxPlan/TxRun/TxShow). Update surface_count assertion
from 33 to 34 and adjust coverage matrix totals accordingly. Add
mutation_surfaces_identified test assertion for TxRollback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
